languages.text: "Так или иначе, мы должны довести эксперимент до конца".

languages.text: "One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."
languages.original_text: "Так или иначе, мы должны довести эксперимент до конца".

traits.locale_text: "One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."
"One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."
"One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."

languages.text: 「何としてでも、その実験は最後までやり遂げなければならない」
languages.original_text: "One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."

traits.locale_text: 「何としてでも、その実験は最後までやり遂げなければならない。」

languages.text: “无论如何，我们必须把实验进行到底。”
languages.original_text: "One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."

traits.locale_text: “无论如何，我们必须把实验进行到底。”

languages.text: «De una forma u otra, debo llevar este experimento a cabo hasta su última instancia».
languages.original_text: "One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."

traits.locale_text: «De una forma u otra, debo llevar este experimento a cabo hasta su última instancia».

languages.text: "So oder so müssen wir das Experiment zu Ende führen."
languages.original_text: "One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."

traits.locale_text: "So oder so müssen wir das Experiment zu Ende führen."

languages.text: « Nous devons aller jusqu'au bout de cette expérience, d'une manière ou d'une autre. »
languages.original_text: "One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."

traits.locale_text: « Nous devons aller jusqu'au bout de cette expérience, d'une manière ou d'une autre. »
